entry.title: Re: Maintenance Strategy Adobe Forms On-Premise
entry.content:
Hello @peterbarker,

you are writing "where a Cloud approach is not feasible" - is it under the decision of the customer or must be a technical reason to not use the cloud-service?

Is there a licensing/pricing information available if a customer on prem/private cloud wants to use "SAP HANA Extended Application Services, Advanced Model (XSA)" for Adobe forms?

Thank you,
Michael

entry.title: Re: automatic assignment of Support Team to incident in solution manager 7.2
entry.content: I have added tag "SOLMAN IT Service Management". This will help attract more attention from my colleagues to the question.

entry.title: Re: Retrofit for same SID systems between on prem and ris...
entry.content:
Hi Saikat, 

You cannot have same system SID in the same transport domain, this is a TMS limitation.

But you could have the same SID in different transport domains and have a domain link between them. 

You can have systems with same SID but just can't be in the same transport route/domain.

At SolMan side you will have two different technical sytems for these two systems. Then retrofit could be performed between the different transport domains.

Hope this helps,

Dolores

entry.title: Re: Manage Situation Types - Extended - Create button not...
entry.content:
Hi @ana_goncalves

I am using an Customizing tenant

entry.title: Re: MRP Strategy Group : Gross requirements planning - MT...
entry.content:
Dear Johannes,

Thank you for your feedback.
I understand the content.

I also confirmed that LSF requirements was created in MD04.
This is probably due to changing the MRP strategy group from 40 to 11.

Thank you for your cooperation.

entry.title: How to track stock movement detail in EWM
entry.content:
Hello. In EWM, HUs are merged and splitted.

When a specific HU is issued, it may be merged one with many other hu,

or it may be splited one from origin hu.

it makes it hard to track stock history....

Is there a configuration or function to accurately track the source (PO or IDO) of the stock included in the HU?

thanks.

entry.title: Re: SAP Business Network Catalog Management and Product Discovery (BNCAT-363)
entry.content: Welcome to the Community @akashbansode-34! Happy to see this interesting Blog here too. It would be of help to many. Best Wishes 👍

entry.title: Re: SAC Rolling Forecast Multi Selection issue
entry.content: Look back or look ahead version input control only allow single selection, I believe the error you are having is because you are selecting Actual for look ahead input control which same as version selected for look back.

entry.title: Re: SAP Learning Hub Enablement Sessions - New webinars starting 29 May 2025
entry.content:
Hi @grant_boreham,
Thank you for sharing this vital information with all of us. 
These webinar series are actually going to be pretty useful.
Have a nice day ahead!
Best Regards
Arun

entry.title: How Can I Automatically Update WM Stock to Unrestricted After QA32 Without LU04?
entry.content: In our current process, once the Quality Management team performs a Usage Decision (UD) via transaction QA32, the stock is correctly updated from quality inspection to unrestricted use in Inventory Management (IM). However, the corresponding stock in Warehouse Management (WM) remains in stock category Q. To reflect the change in WM, it is necessary to manually execute transaction LU04 to create and confirm a transfer order. I am looking for a way to streamline this process by ensuring that the WM stock category is automatically updated to unrestricted immediately after the UD is made, thereby eliminating the need for manual intervention through LU04.

entry.title: Re: Migration Template "Warehouse Stock (new)" - Document Header Text - Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Talke, I checked the object document - Warehouse stock (new) and sample file as well. As you mentioned there is no such field available in the standard template. Could you please share more information like:
1) are you want to add ‘HeaderText’ field in MIGO 2) in which application or place are you checking this 'document header text'?
Based on the information provided, I can help on informing potentional expert in that specific area.
Best regards,
Irene

entry.title: Re: Adjustment to the provisioning script (IPS Job)
entry.content:
I had exactly same scenario with you. 80k+ users on Entra ID and the actual users needs to be provisioned is only 2-3k assigned to a specific groups on Entra ID. 

Unfortunately, IPS jobs needs to fetch all users and performs the filtering after fetch completes. This part didn't completed in my case. IPS is using "Users" entity as an entry point during users provisioning. I've tried to investigate Microsoft Graph APIs to find a better filtering option. Unfortunately, User entity does not support filtering by group assignments. This is the limitation on the IPS side, which seems reasonable to me. 

You have an option to start provisioning from Microsoft, instead of SAP IPS. (This was also recommended us by SAP Support if we need a group filtering within large number of users).

There is a provisioning functionality on Microsoft Entra ID, as well. I tried this option, and worked fine except I was not able to provision Object ID from Microsoft Entra ID -> Global User ID on SAP IAS probably due to bug. I see there are new documentation, this might also be resolved. You can try this method:

https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/entra/identity/saas-apps/sap-cloud-platform-identity-authentication-provisioning-tutorial

In my case, since Object ID sync is a mandatory property for us, I tried to create a intermediate Standalone Approuter on BTP which takes the requests from IPS and manipulating the request to convert it from /Users entity to /Group/members entity with regular expressions and forwards it to the Microsoft Graph. That works fine so far for a while but this is only a workaround with limitations (I need to create separate jobs for each user group). I would suggest you first to implement provisoning on the Microsoft Entra ID.

Hope this helps. 

Abdul.

entry.title: Re: How to do the total or sub total in RAP custom query
entry.content: Yes it is possible using @Default aggregation #sum on top of filed where you want total and then do grouping on another field where you want subtotal.

entry.title: Re: Troubles with IDOC and write modus append for SFTP se...
entry.content:
as already mentioned, there is a temp file solution. So the file is written into the target SFTP with a temporarily file name. However, it only works if the receiver is picking up only files that not matches the temporarily filename.  We had one partner in the past, they only could poll with "*" in the folder. So we agreed on the time in the hour we are writing and he is reading. So we where transferring the files between xx:00 - and xx:30 and he was only picking up 2nd half of the hour.

If there is the problem vise versa: How to influence PI - as with the restart you want to continue like this - you have to setup scheduling. Say you start at 01:00 and you end at 23:00 you channel.

entry.title: Re: CDS deep level association - expose to service - problem
entry.content: yes, segw is an option... what i have tried is to do this "in the new way", skipping segw

entry.title: Re: How to do the total or sub total in RAP custom query
entry.content: Yes it is possible using @analytics.dataCategory: #CUBE at header level and @Default aggregation #sum on top of filed where you want total and then do grouping on another field where you want subtotal.

entry.title: Re: How to do the total or sub total in RAP custom query
entry.content: Example you want subtotal by id on amount filed . Apply grouping on ID and apply @Default aggregation #sum on amount filed.

entry.title: Re: New Standard Element of Company
entry.content:
Hey @vickioats 

Are you talking about when you are creating the Organisational Structure in the LMS via the Organisation Connector job?

If you are, and for instance the Employee Central organisation structure could/can combine more than one level such as with the following example: (Level 0 (Legal Entity), Level 1(Business Unit), Level 2 (Division), and Level 3 (Department)), as such this can be then replicated the same in LMS by creating a job in Integration Centre. This way LMS will build the organisation structure as well as updating the descriptions and respecting the Employee Central hierarchy.

The structure of this Integration Centre job differs because it is needed to build the entire organisation structure where there is a Parent Org assigned to each child, to reflect the same as in Employee Central. To comply with this format, the Integration Center job should be created as a Stacked/EDI file with four rows. The number of columns is determined by the number of fields that will be used in the LMS. An Org file must contain fields for the Organization ID (ORG_ID), Organization Description (ORG_DESC), and the Parent Organization (ORG_ID_PARENT).

An example of the layout is below. The Header Line contains the LMS DB field names. These field names will
correspond to the field names in the CONNECTOR properties file.

With the last highlighted field being the Company ID (note this is an Org Object that you add the Description to manually).

Does this help if not answer your question?

Cheers,

Nathan H.

SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central integration to SAP Business Suite 

SAP SuccessFactors Learning

entry.title: Migration of Scout setup from one Solution Manager to another
entry.content:
Hi SAP,

 

Is there any way to migrate existing scout setup from one server to another server?

 

If yes, please help us with all the relevant KBA's/SAP standard documents to achieve this migration.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Migration of Scout setup from one Solution Manager to...
entry.content:
Hi ,

 

I hope you are well.

 

Firstly, please allow me to explain the system copy/migration for a Solution Manager System.

You can find the relevant information at the bottom of the following page

Implementation Sequence | SAP Help Portal

--------

SAP Solution Manager is a centralized application for planning, administration, and operation of a customer’s SAP landscape. Therefore we do not recommend to copy SAP Solution Manager, because this may cause more effort and introduce unexpected negative side effects.

--------

And please kindly know, currently, it is supported for a Solution Manager System copy/migration for a hardware migration. If you do this only because you want to bypass the new configuration of a system, we won’t be able to support the system copy/migration any longer.

 

Secondly, regarding your question, does this mean that you want to migrate the existing configurations of SOLMAN_SETUP?

The existing configurations of SOLMAN_SETUP can not be migrated directly from one server to another.

If you have a new Solution Manager and you want to bypass the new configuration, I suggest re-configuring the SOLMAN_SETUP.

If you want to migrate Solution Manager to a new Host, FQDN, DB, etc., you can refer to KBA 2485195 - SAP Solution Manager migration to new host, FQDN, DB, etc - SAP Solution Manager

 

Best regards,

Leo

SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Can Flexible Column Layout added inside a Object Page...
entry.content:
Hi, Kotresh,

As mentioned in fiori guidelines (https://experience.sap.com/fiori-design-web/flexible-column-layout/#usage )

"The flexible column layout is not restricted to a specific floorplan, as long as the floorplan you use is responsive down to phone size. However, we recommend using the dynamic page." in your case the floorplan refers to Objectpage layout(https://experience.sap.com/fiori-design-web/object-page/) This suggests that while FlexibleColumnLayout offers flexibility, it's best utilized at the top-level structure of your application to manage navigation and layout effectively, which means embedding it in Object page layout is not a good option

Possible workarounds :

If you're trying to show more details inside an Object Page:

  • Use ObjectPageSections and ObjectPageSubSections.

  • For side-by-side detail views, consider using Dialogs, Popovers, or separate navigations via the Flexible Column Layout structure at the top level.

Thanks,

Rithika

entry.title: Re: Retention period for tasks completed in Build Process...

entry.title: Re: Adjustment to the provisioning script (IPS Job)
entry.content: Hi @abdulbasit,

entry.title: Re: Adjustment to the provisioning script (IPS Job)
entry.content: Hi @abdulbasit, Thank you very much for the exchange and for sharing your experiences with us. We actually started with provisioning from Entra ID. However, this did not meet our requirements since the group attributes were not synced. We have already opened a ticket with both SAP and Microsoft regarding this issue. Unfortunately, each provider referred us to the other, which ultimately led us to decide to start the provisioning from IPS.

entry.title: Re: Can GRN be restricted based on issued quantity in pro...
entry.content:
Hi Priyanka,

you can link the goods receipt to a confirmation for the manufacturing order. In this case the setting automatic goods receipt is made in the control key of the operation or phase.

Try settings in Confirmation Parameters -> Individual Entry General tab -> Error Handling/Logs -> Goods Movement Terminate for Incorrect Goods Movement.

This works for Backflush (Automatic Goods Issue).

or You can add your own checks during the confirmation with BAdIs WORKORDER_CONFIRM or WORKORDER_GOODSMVT.

Regards,

Vikas

entry.title: Re: Account Based COPA and cost element assignments
entry.content: nobody has any inputs please ?

entry.title: Re: Adjustment to the provisioning script (IPS Job)
entry.content: I didn't try group provisioning on Entra ID. Not the best solution, but did you consider provisioning groups from IPS and users from Entra ID?

entry.title: Re: LE-TRA in S/4 HANA Public cloud TM
entry.content:
Hello @S_Arora 

LE-TRA is already part of S/4HANA compatibility scope. That's S/4HANA private cloud or on-premise. As such LE-TRA is not available in S/4HANA public cloud. Even if technically S/4HANA public cloud still contains some artefacts of LE-TRA and could run it, I don't think SAP would make it available. There is really no reason for them to support two distinct solutions (LE-TRA and TM) addressing the same business processes. 

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Cost Centre Actual Activity Price & Maintenance Order...
entry.content:
Hello

Please Refer to below note :

Note 156563 - Settlement after activity allocation/revaluation

1. pre settlement pm order (T-code: KO88-KO8G)

2.Revaluate Material consumption for PM order ( if the pricing method of materials are 3) (T-Code- CKMLCP)

Best Regards 

Ghazal Afshar

3.Run Actual Cost Splitting (T-Code- KSS2) for PM cost center

4.Run Actual Price Calculation formula( T-Code- KSII )

5.Run Actual Revaluation of internal orders ( T-Code- KON2 )

6.final settlement (T-code: KO88-KO8G)

entry.title: SAP Community Meetup Riga - May 29, 2025
entry.content:
Hi folks,

It has been a while since our last event, and we are excited to invite you to join the SAP Community Meetup in Riga on May 29, 2025.

Event Details:

  • Offline event 
  • Date: May 29, 2025
  • Time: 17:00 - 21:00
  • Location:  16th floor, EPAM Systems Latvia, Jauna Teika Building "Henrihs", Gustava Zemgala gat. 74A, Riga, Latvia

Draft Agenda:

TimeDurationTopicSpeaker
17:00 - 17:1515 minRegistration & Networking 
17:15 - 17:3015 minIntroduction & WelcomingVladimirs Semikins and Dmitrijs Pozdnakovs
17:30 - 18:1545 minSAP Signavio Transformation SuiteKristina Koronevich (EPAM Systems)
18:15 - 18:3015 minBreak 
18:30 - 19:1040 minPlaceholdertbd
19:10 - 19:2010 minBreak 
19:20 - 20:0040 minEnable SAP Kyma environment for Enterprise Ready extensions.Oleksandr Ardashov (EPAM Systems)
20:00 - 20:4040 minPlaceholderAccenture
20:40 - 20:5515 minClosing RemarksVladimirs Semikins and Dmitrijs Pozdnakovs


Just a heads up, the agenda might change a bit! We want this to be a cozy and friendly gathering, so we might adjust things as we go along. We’re all about open discussions—let’s keep the conversation flowing and make it a fun evening!

entry.title: Re: [Webinar] Transition to SAP Cloud ALM: A Strategic Shift for Modern Enterprises
entry.content:
Q&A during the session

QuestionAnswer 

Any roadmap for movement of of gCTS changes by CALM?

No, it's still on the vision. Please kindly request it in our influence program: Influence Opportunity Homepage - Customer Influence
SDT option in CALM is generally available or have to be enabled by SAP based on customer use case?As a pre-requisite, ensure you have access to your own SAP Cloud ALM tenant and SAP Solution Manager 7.2 SP15 (or above) system. You can find more details in the link - https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blog-posts-by-sap/expert-guided-implementation-selective-data-transfer-from-sap-solution/ba-p/13977921?sap-outbound-id=1EC862945BC9E7CB5C8A48945294D4467E89376F
Post transition>For tracking old change Document details, do we need to keep Solman or other alternate option in CALM?For the old and existing Change Documents, you need to finish them in SAP Solution Manager. No change documents will be migrate from SAP Solution Manager to SAP Cloud ALM.

Upon checking the terminal i got an error 
Says : 

{"error":{"code":"501","message":"Entity \"RiskManagementService.A_BusinessPartner\" is annotated with \"@cds.persistence.skip\" and cannot be served generically."}}

Any answer can help.
Thanks!

entry.title: Re: API_SALES_ORDER_SRV pricing details with print flag
entry.content:
Hi @ray_mannion ,
You can find subtotals in sales order item entity (Subtotal1Amount, Subtotal2Amount...).
https://api.sap.com/api/API_SALES_ORDER_SRV/schema

If that is not sufficient for you, you can also try out the OData V4 API, which also supports reading the complete pricing details including subtotals (see documentation)
https://api.sap.com/api/CE_SALESORDER_0001/overview

best regards,
Christian

In our case, the performance issue occurs during initial user provisioning. Can you please clarify more, how this can be used during user provisioning by their Entra ID group assignments?

Thanks, Abdul.

entry.title: Re: How Are Staging Tables Created in SAP Data Migration...
entry.content: For example, if I consider the migration object as Bank Master, it shows the reference structure S_BNKA for creating staging tables. How can I check whether this structure exists in SE11 or elsewhere? Also, I would like to understand how the staging table is being generated and what is the logic behind it..

entry.title: Re: SAP AI CORE Free Tier Service
entry.content:
Hi @Sachin8 ,

With SAP AI Core's Free Tier plan, you can do the following:

  • Get to know SAP AI Core.
  • Limited to one instance per global account, one execution or deployment running at any given time, the default resource group and the Starter resource plan.
  • Only community support is available for free tier service plans and these are not subject to SLAs.

You will be able to access the Starter plan, which offers 1 CPU with 3GB of memory. With this, you should be able to deploy and train a model, provided the training and deployment can be done with these limited resources. 

 

Cheers,

Guruprasad GL

entry.title: SAP on IBM i: IBM i 7.6 certified for SAP Solutions
entry.content:
As of April 15, 2025, SAP released IBM i 7.6 for all SAP Solutions running on SAP NetWeaver.

The certification is valid for SAP NetWeaver 7.x based products that have been in Mainstream or Extended Maintenance at the beginning of 2025 (see SAP Platform Availability Matrix and Maintenance Strategy). For additional information refer to SAP Notes 68440 and 3589826.

IBM i 7.6 has been announced by IBM on April 8th, 2025, and is generally available since April 18th, 2025. For details about this release, we would like to point you to the official IBM Release Announcement AD25-0031 and the IBM i 7.6 – Base Enhancements overview.

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps - Rest API config display issue

entry.title: Re: Upload account statement MT940 incorrect
entry.content: 28C contains the statement number. If this is always 0 you should ask the service provider if they can activate the numbering. Otherwise you will need to update it yourself (badi/userexit)

entry.title: Re: How to add macro on Refresh in SAC excel Add-in

Supporting VBA for Microsoft Excel (desktop version) 
if this covers your requirements.

entry.title: Anyone has SAP SF end user training material for employee and manager.?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I am creating an end-user training material in SAP SF EC for employee and manager. Does anyone have the training material sample format?

entry.title: Re: Cross model copy from old model (Account base) to New...
entry.content:
Hi @9160ruby

The LC value in the old model appears to be a 4-decimal-place value, while the conversion rate seems to be a 7-decimal-place value. As a result, the GC value (1.Conversion)  in the old model was calculated with 7 decimal places, and the same 7-decimal-place value was copied (2.Copy - Link) to the GC in the new model. The GC value (3.Conversion) in the new model is computed using the 7-decimal-place LC value and rate, which causes a difference compared to the LC value in the old model. Please refer to the screenshot below for the calculation flow. 

 

SAC calculates values with 7 decimal places as the default setting.

Regards,

Moonjun

entry.title: Re: 1H25 optional survey - no display on BizX homepage
entry.content: Hello, the reason for my query is that the optional feedbacks have a due date and according to the article have not yet been supported. With release 1H25 the optional feedbacks are now supported on the new ILX home page. My assumption was that this would also have a transparent effect on the BizX start page. Will this still come.

entry.title: Re: Custom field and logics
entry.content:
Hi Tehreem,

Could you provide some more information on this. Including the app id that you are referring too and a screenshot showing which user interfaces have you enabled this custom field.

Thanks,
Prasanth

entry.title: Re: Missing Data in UPL
entry.content:
SOLMAN Custom Code Management function usage data are mostly collected from managed system SCMON or /SDF/SCMON. If an object cannot be collected by SCMON due to any kind of restriction, then usage data will also be missing in SOLMAN.

From your description, it is not a direct execution of methods or function modules. My suggestion would be paying attention to specify the object name in corresponding fields of "Called Objects" in SCMON instead of Calling Request Entry Points.

entry.title: Re: How Are Staging Tables Created in SAP Data Migration...
entry.content:
Hi @blkanth77, the quickest way to check the mapping between Structure and table is clicking on the number of Tables in Migrate Your Data app. You will find the technical name for structure (S_*) and technical ID for staging table (/1LT/DS<system ID><numeric identifier>).

Of course you can check the value entered in backend by searching this table or you can just open Migrate Object Instance screen to check the value.

All of the information mentioned above can be found in: 

Transferring Data to Staging Tables
=>
The system automatically creates database tables for each migration object in a project. These database tables are called staging tables. For each migration object, the system creates one or more staging tables. The staging tables have the naming convention /1LT/DS<system ID><numeric identifier>, for example /1LT/DSQKX000928.

KBA 2733253 - FAQ for SAP S/4HANA migration cockpit. Migration approach: Transfer / Migrate data using staging tables

Regards,
Irene

entry.title: Re: How to pass filters in SAP BTP destination REST API integration in SAP Build Apps
Re: How to pass filters in SAP BTP destination REST API integration in SAP Build Apps
entry.content: Hello @Dan_Wroblewski, Thank you for your response. and regarding the issue I found the solution in one of your blog. Thanks again

entry.title: Re: Couldn"t find transport requests in BW bridge (Ec...
entry.content:
Hi, thanks for asking question that couldn't find transport requests in BW bridge (Eclipse).

Answer: yes, It is possible to see all Transport requests in BW Bridge if a Task is created with your User ID.
Step 1: Login to Eclipse BW Bridge
Step 2: Open 'Window' from menu bar , select "Show View" and then 'Other'
Step 1: Search 'Transport' to open "Transport Organizer" under ABAP
Step 1: drill down ABAP Cloud project and see Transport No in 'Modifiable' under Workbench folder as shown in attached 'Bridge TR' screenshot.

Regards,
Naveen Kumar
Certified SAP BI-BW4HANA Consultant

entry.title: Issue with artifact_content quota
entry.content:
I have facing issue with artifact_content quota , Can any one guide

How to increase artifact_content quota for specific sub-account.

entry.title: Re: 历史导入固定资产减值业务如何操作
entry.content:
Hello @devinchao ,

请使用App:管理固定资产，选中所需资产-> 过账 ->过账购置 ->过账贷项凭证，调整资产原值

注：调整凭证对方科目为购置清算科目(Technical clearing)，可根据业务需求进一步手工调整

详情参考：016.固定资产如何增加或者减少原值？ - S/4HANA Cloud 资产会计问题 - 引导解决决策树 - Guided Answers

Kind Regards,

entry.title: Re: Quering document lines in user define values
entry.content:
Hi,

I see from your last comment that you are trying to multiply the quantity. That is the reason for your syntax error, as the query I wrote only takes the field value, so it treats it as a string. To multiply with 24 you need this:

SELECT ($[$38.11.Number] * 24) FROM DUMMY

BR,

Matija

entry.title: Re: Custom field with multiline in S4 public cloud-key us...
entry.content:
Hi Shabir,

Can you try and see if you can modify how the custom field appears on the GUI screen using screen personas? FYI you will be able to resize the field for webGUI screens using personas.

Thanks,
Prasanth

entry.title: Re: Announcing the New "In-Metro" Disaster Recovery Solution for SAP BTP
entry.content:
Hi @rika1 
When it comes to the backups for SAP BTP Standard DR - these backups are managed and executed by SAP as provider of SAP BTP. That does not protect customers against local failures on their end - meaning if they by accident delete something on their end, these backups cannot be utilized as they're only for disaster recovery reasons. SAP defines the disasters and executes the disaster recovery when needed. 

For local backups of BTP services on customer side, if available, please check the corresponding services product documentation in SAP Help Portal.

entry.title: Re: error : failed to fetch data
entry.content: Hi, Not sure what this means. Could you please elaborate on this? Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Sales Order overall blocked status SPSTG
entry.content: As for FSSTK and LSSTK. If no block it is ' '. If block it is 'B' or 'C'. So, how to set them to value 'A'?

entry.title: Re: Warehouse Task Status changing to A . Not allowing to do Deconsolidation.
entry.content: Hello,

entry.title: Custom Flexible Workflow Email Notification set up recipient and send email addresses
entry.content:
Hi all,

We are on S4 HANA.  I have developed a custom flexible workflow and want to make use of email notification. I have copied "SWF_CRT_NOTIFY_RECIPIENTS" and created YY1_900000004_CRT_ALL.  WS900000004 is my workflow ID.  Can someone help me on how to setup recipient and sender email addresses.  No emails are going out as of now after the creation or approval tasks.  Is there any other configuration required ?

entry.title: Re: Warehouse Task Status changing to A . Not allowing to do Deconsolidation.
entry.content: Hello, As extension to the above error, though i haven't maintained the putaway external step in POSC, it is cancelling Please guide and help me where i am going wrong here. Thanks in advance Bhargavi.

entry.title: Re: Consume product that are not relevant for staging in SAP EWM
Re: Multiple datasources for custom Adobe Form
entry.content:
Hi Egbert,

Have you tried the solution that is explained here https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blog-posts-by-sap/calling-custom-adobe-form-in-abap-on-cloud-embedded-steampunk/ba-p/13585170? This talks about how to build a custom form using Adobe Form Service on BTP, host it on BTP and integrate that with your RAP application to generate custom forms.

Thanks,
Prasanth

entry.title: Re: Future dated onboardees cannot be searched via Inacti...
entry.content:
Hi @karthick_0905 

Thank you for your response.
Unfortunately, I do not see the permissions under Employee Data that you are talking about. I have already enabled the "Include Inactive Employees in the Search" in RBP but it doesn't work.

Can you specify the exact permission please? That would be very much helpful.

entry.title: Re: How To Use REST APIs in SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
Hi Daniel, Thanks for this post!

I have a question regarding SAP Build Code, how can integrate an api with SAP BUILD CODE ?

Thanks

Helda

entry.title: Re: Connect with SAP Community at SAP Sapphire and Share Your Special SAP Event Moment!
entry.content:
I have so many memorable moments hard to pick a few of them. But, these are the ones that I've found:

I think this is the best one. It was my first SAPPHIRE in Orlando and happy to be part of this "Dream Shot". 

Teched's were always fun! This is from 2013 celebrating 10th year of SCN. 

Don't remember the year, but looks like we were having fun during InnoJam together with my fellow Community Turkey team. 

When we talk about fun, it can't be without foods 🙂 cc: @Vitaliy-R 

This is very special moment. We used to have a family picture at our SAP Inside Track events. Covid didn't stop us taking this picture 🤘

Another fun moment from Teched. Having fun in the Jam Band! 

 

@lukemarson @Pazahanick_Jarr @MartinGillet @abesh @ridvan_polat  @BesteSahinPolat @tahir_z @SerkanOzcan @MustafaKerimYilmaz @huseyindereli @keremkoseoglu @NilPeksen @alperdedeoglu @SamiBesli @BulutAltintas @SerkanBoyuk @ugurcandan @BarisBuyuktanir @AbitYıldız ... and many more.

entry.title: Re: How to add URL parameters to a function import call in Action Project in SAP BPA
entry.content: WHen you say add to suffix, what do you mean? Also did not understand how URL parameters could be in the body?

entry.title: "Could Not Load Content" Error in DevTools After BAS Deployment
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

When I run a UI5 application deployed through the BAS IDE and try to inspect the code in DevTools > Sources, I get the following error for any controller I select:

Could not load content for https://xxxx.xxxx.net:40031/sap/bc/ui5_ui5/sap/appName/~20250506134842~/controller/warehouseList-dbg.controller.js 
(HTTP error: status code 404, net::ERR_HTTP_RESPONSE_CODE_FAILURE)

Interestingly, if I made a change in a specific controller before deployment, the error doesn't appear for that one controller, only for the others.

I'm not sure if this is related to deployment settings or something else. I've never encountered this issue when deploying from SAP Web IDE.

Any suggestions or insights would be greatly appreciated!

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Access to your data in S/4HANA Cloud Public edition a...
entry.content: Hi Jeremy, thank you very much for your answer! I received a question from the customer, related to point 1 in your answer Data Export from SAP, does this also contain all attachments; Stock Counting Sheets, Supplier Invoices, Delivery Notes, PR/PO attachments. thank you in advance! Kind regards, Axel

entry.title: Re: How to Approve/Reject Task via API in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hi @Dan_Wroblewski and @padma_kumar_perumal ,

I encountered a similar issue, but I’m happy to report that it has been resolved. According to the response from SAP, the root cause analysis (RCA) was as follows:

RCA:
A regression related to cache handling in a proxy application release affected subsequent services. Unfortunately, this issue was not detected in time on internal test systems, which led to the regression being rolled out to production landscapes, impacting customer scenarios. Upon receiving customer tickets, the bug was identified by the development team, and a rollback to the previous version of the proxy application was implemented. This effectively resolved the issue for affected customers.

I hope this helps anyone facing similar issues!

entry.title: Re: New Hire Onboarding Survey using Custom Task in Onboarding 2.0
entry.content:
Hi 

I followed the steps but the new hire is not able to see the dropdown values.
Can you elaborate on how to write the rule to make the dropdown values visible to onboardee.

regards,
Sayyed shahid

entry.title: Re: Problem with my SAP Fiori Elements app
entry.content: Seems like a data issue for date/datetime related field,,, pls check details in /IWFND/ERROR_LOG

entry.title: Re: Connect with SAP Community at SAP Sapphire and Share Your Special SAP Event Moment!
entry.content: @abdulbasit Thanks a lot for sharing. I'm very moved by seeing all these pictures of great people and memories. There is nothing like the community spirit!

entry.title: Re: no permissions to create and activate the SSCUI - 105...
entry.content:
Please check SAP note: 2752164 

Go to "Maintain Business Role" app and check whether the User ID is assigned to the Business Role, as well as the following configurations are set for the "SAP_BR_BPC_EXPERT" role:

  • Write Access: Unrestricted
  • Read Access: Unrestricted
  • Value Help Access: Unrestricted
  • Editing Status: Active

  •

entry.title: Re: Process Manager Simulation
entry.content:
Good day MikeB1234 ,

 

Thank you for sharing your inquiry on the SAP Community!  It is recommended that you 

create a support case using SAP for Me (log in with S-User ID and password), as described in this video, to have an expert look into this specific issue.

 

If you have additional questions in creating a support case, you can find more details in the SAP Signavio Onboarding Resource Center. 

 

Kind regards,

 

KantriceD

entry.title: Re: How Can I Automatically Update WM Stock to Unrestrict...
entry.content:
Hello @Khan1010 

I don't think the problem is that the WM stock is not updated and that it stays in the stock category Q. If that was the case, you would have stock inconsistencies between MM and WM; that would be a major issue requiring SAP support. Rather, the issue is that WM stock is updated but stays in the interim storage type and you need to move the updated stock between interim storage type and the physical one with LU04.

You can automate this process with immediate transfer order creation. See the note 566090 - FAQ for immediate transfer order creation for detailed information on the process, its setup and limitations. 

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: SAP Workflow Management Business Rule's Rulesets Capa...
entry.content:
Hi @ck_t2020 

In SBPA it is possible to create a decision with multiple Decision Tables or Text Rules. 
I recommend to use variables to store the results of your Decision Tables and then via a Text Rule provide the correct output. 

Reusing Decision Tables in different Decisions is not possible. 

Could you motivate why you want to reuse a Decision Table?
Couldn't you simple create a Decision, and just reuse it?

entry.title: Planned cost of production order doesn't update automatically when changing the layout.
entry.content: When creating a production order(CO01), the planned cost can be automatically brought out after changing the layout 1SAP02. However, the DEV Client (2025 SAP PCE) needs to save the default layout and exit and re-enter to refresh the planned cost.

entry.title: Re: Free SAP Learning Hub, explore student Edition
entry.content:
hello @David_Chaviano ,

i tried reaching you through the vlog since 2 weeks, there has been no update of the student edition after the verification been done. I got the mail saying that its been verified but no activation link has been received. I think many are facing the issue, i also tried raising the ticket but no luck there too. i hope you can reply with what to do next to resolve this as soon as possible as my learning is centered on SAP,

thank you,
regards
sayyed

entry.title: SAP DRC for e-invoicing
entry.content: Does SAP DRC require any more access points after getting Peppol registration?

entry.title: Who knows off an application that can work with SuccessFactors for mass hires and rehires?
entry.content:
Our customer requires an application that can work/integrate with SuccessFactors for mass hires, rehires and other mass uploads. We looked at Mass Data Management but it is not support with the Recruiting activities.
Anyone that knows of another application that might be worth investigating?
Thanks
Leonie Engelbrecht

entry.title: Re: Partially compounded display keys in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hi @Privete_member__978716, 

This actually should be supported. Please see here -> https://me.sap.com/notes/2715030

You would need ≥ 7.52 + Note 3159902. 

Best, 
Sajoscha

entry.title: Re: Cross model copy from old model (Account base) to New...
entry.content:
Hi @9160ruby

You already created a Data action for Currency conversion step, please add one more Script step with the below Advanced formulas script.

MEMBERSET [d/Measures] = "LC"

DATA() = ROUND(RESULTLOOKUP(), 4)
  • Adding Advanced Formulas Step

Regards,

Moonjun

entry.title: Re: How to reach out to SAP Education - Learning Hub team for support
entry.content: Dear @sayyedshahid I am sorry to hear that you have not received a reply from the Learning team. Could you please contact us at CIC via Phone, Email or Chat and we will be happy to assist you. We will need your case ID number and user details to follow up with the Learning team on this.

entry.title: SAP Boosts ABAP Code Generation with Constrained Decoding and NVIDIA NIM
entry.content:
Generative AI has transformed how developers work by streamlining coding tasks and accelerating the transition from concepts to functional code. ABAP is SAP’s proprietary programming language and a critical foundation for SAP’s ERP systems and SAP S/4HANA Cloud, making it a crucial target for specialized AI.

Earlier this year, we unveiled the general availability of Joule for Developers in ABAP Development Tools (ADT). To bring this to life, we built an ABAP large language model (LLM) trained on more than 300 million lines of internal ABAP code as well as natural language documentation. A key capability of Joule for Developers is predictive code completion which suggests code snippets in real time in a “context-aware” fashion.

In this blog post we introduce how we leverage Constrained Decoding for code generation to 1) accelerate development time, 2) reduce errors, and 3) increase compliance and reliability. Throughout this process, we collaborated closely with NVIDIA to leverage NVIDIA NIM ™ microservices for efficient inference.

 

  Figure 1: Joule for Developers integrated in ABAP Development Tools (ADT)

 

The importance of generating reliable and compliant ABAP syntax

Because ABAP is a closed-source and low-resource language, general purpose commercial LLMs often struggle to produce correct syntax and follow ABAP cloud programming best practices. Their performance is subpar compared to their capabilities in more commonly used languages such as python and Java. To close the performance gap of available LLMs on ABAP, we trained our own ABAP foundational model using internal ABAP code as well as high quality, manually labeled data. Given the complexity of the business logic involved, even minor syntax or logical errors can lead to costly disruptions.  Adhering to SAP-specific standards is therefore crucial.

Introducing constrained code generation using an ultra-fast ABAP parser

Constrained decoding revolves around verifying each token or entire statements in real time against ABAP’s strict grammar rules and SAP’s evolving standards. If a partial suggestion seems wrong, whether due to syntax, language-version differences (such as ABAP Cloud), or SAP-specific compliance rules, the parser instantly flags and refines it, ensuring that only correct suggestions are presented to the user.

Figure 2 shows how constrained decoding works using a simple example. Every potential token sequence (e.g., “value1 + value2”) is evaluated against the ABAP grammar. If the most likely next token or statement would violate ABAP syntax (such as prematurely ending a class, or creating an unbalanced block boundary), the parser flags it as invalid and discards that path. This pruning process guarantees that the final output strictly adheres to the defined ABAP rules and structure.

In detail, if {x₁, x₂, …, xᵢ₋₁} is the partial sequence generated so far. At step i, we let the language model define a probability distribution over potential next tokens t as:

P_model (t | x₁, …, xᵢ₋₁).

We denote by G(x₁, …, xᵢ₋₁, t) ∈ {True, False} a grammar-validation function powered by the ABAP parser that evaluates whether the sequence (x₁, …, xᵢ₋₁, t) adheres to ABAP syntax. The set of valid next tokens is then:

Vᵢ = { t | G(x₁, …, xᵢ₋₁, t) = True }.

The constrained decoding step then selects the highest probability token from the valid set. By ensuring that t must lie in Vᵢ, the process discards any token violating ABAP syntax, thereby boosting the grammar-compliance of the sequence. The same procedure can be applied to restrict the generations to special ABAP language versions, such as ABAP cloud-compliant objects and APIs.

 

 Figure 2: Token-wise Constrained Decoding for ABAP

 

This approach hinges on the speed and accuracy of the ABAP parser to evaluate each potential next token during inference. To ensure it works effectively we implemented a Rust-based parser and collaborated with NVIDIA to integrate it into the inference engine in NVIDIA NIM.

Evaluating Constrained Generation for ABAP

To quantify how well constrained decoding contributes to generating working ABAP code, we assembled a diverse benchmark of real-world ABAP Cloud programming tasks. Each programming task is accompanied with several unit tests that check correct and cloud compliant implementation. So, the simplest, most objective metric becomes: does the generated code pass all its unit tests? This is referred to as the Unit Test Pass Rate (Figure 3).

 

 Figure 3: Performance benchmark for a diverse set of ABAP code generation tasks

 

GPT-4, a standard state-of-the-art LLM, passes just over half of our ABAP Cloud tests, underscoring how niche language constructs and SAP-specific APIs can trip up generic models. Simply switching to our internally trained ABAP model lifts the pass rate to 76%. This model has seen ABAP grammar, definitions, and APIs that are relevant for day-to-day development. Through token-wise and statement-wise constrained decoding and sampling we further boosted the performance to 84% enabling additional tasks to be solved automatically.

 

Collaborated with NVIDIA to Add Support for SAP ABAP Constrained Decoding to NIM

Deploying constrained decoding for ABAP code generation hinges on having a flexible, high-performance LLM inference framework – so we’ve collaborated with NVIDIA to leverage NIM. NVIDIA NIM is a set of easy-to-use microservices designed to accelerate the deployment of generative AI models across the cloud, data centers, and workstations. Together with NVIDIA, SAP designed and developed a custom guided decoding capability leveraging NIM, which provided the key features below for an effective implementation of ABAP constrained decoding in the LLM inference pipeline.

 

Seamless Integration

NIM's API allows for straightforward integration of our custom logits processor and ABAP parser. Figure 4 shows the architectural diagram of how ABAP constrained decoding is integrated and deployed via a NIM container.


 Figure 4: Architecture of ABAP Constrained Decoding in NIM

 

 

By implementing the logit processing functionality through a Python interface, we inject our grammar validation logic directly into the token generation process. This means that each potential token can be evaluated against ABAP grammar rules in real-time, effectively pruning invalid paths before they're suggested to the developer. Our custom implementations can be stored as packaged directories and loaded into NIM at runtime.

 

Flexible Runtime Selection

One significant advantage of NIM is its support for multiple custom decoding backends, with the ability to switch between them on the fly per user query. This flexibility allows us to employ different parsing strategies based on the specific ABAP context (such as switching between standard ABAP and ABAP Cloud constraints) without needing a separate deployment for each ABAP language version.

 

Optimized Performance

Despite the additional validation steps, the Rust-based ABAP parser integration through NIM maintains high throughput and low latency. The highly optimized infrastructure handles the token-by-token validation efficiently, ensuring that code suggestions appear promptly in the developer's environment. Our benchmarks show that the constrained decoding approach adds minimal overhead compared to unconstrained generation, while significantly improving the quality and compliance of the suggestions.

When compared with alternative baseline inference solution for a typical server request workload, our co-designed NIM achieves up to 31% better latency and up to 26% better throughput. Figure 5 shows various normalized latency and throughput metrics.


 Figure 5: Latency and Throughput Comparison of Co-Designed NIM Solution vs. Alternative

  

State Management

NIM's state management capabilities proved invaluable for complex ABAP syntax validation that requires context tracking (such as nested code blocks or statement boundaries). By leveraging the context variables feature, our parser can maintain awareness of the current syntax state throughout the token generation process, ensuring that suggestions remain contextually appropriate.

 

Summary

At SAP, we continually innovate to improve ABAP developer productivity. Constrained decoding is one such technique. This approach elevates Joule for Developers’ code completion functionality by narrowing the model’s output space with a millisecond‑fast Rust parser. With NVIDIA, we co-designed our solution to leverage a custom decoding backend to deliver constrained decoding with optimized performance powered by NIM.  Looking ahead, we will extend the grammar layer to accommodate additional constraints, updated APIs and evolving SAP guidelines.

 

 

Authored by: Salma Sohrabi-Jahromi, Abdelaziz Ben Othman, Karthikeyan Asokkuma, Philipp Herzig; and NVIDIA: Yi Fan, Neal Vaidya, Jeff Farris, Bhuvan Agrawal, Tricia Barr.

entry.title: When Customer become Prisonner of SAP Ariba Support
entry.content:
SAP is a good tool because there are many possibilities and flexibility and the broad area it can cover, but one of the SAP weaknesses has been the support of customer, especially when it comes to SAP Ariba Support. But there is a saying that said, "SAP doesn't have customer, they have prisoners" and I clearly faced that today.

As implementation consultant, one of my activities, is to use the system intensively, and push the system to it limit, which some time I discover lot of issues or bug and usually after multiple check and possible workaround I will report the issue to SAP. In more than 90% of the case, the Ariba Support will mention nonsense reply, and set the case as "Solution proposed" which close your case automatically after few days....

SAP has released a solution that allows to send Storage Location to SAP Ariba using CIG [CP-8143: Inventory reservation for SAP ERP-integrated sites (https://help.sap.com/docs/ariba/sap-ariba-applications-2002-q1-2020-release-guide/cp-8143-changes-to-data-import-and-export)]. So, they developed a solution and release that solution, but we don't know how it was tested, but it was released, thus, customer will do the following:

  1. in S4 run ARBCIG_MASTER_DATA_EXPORT program
  2. select Storage Location (StorageLocation.csv) maybe together with other Master Data object and execute the program.
  3. the data is extracted and sent to SAP Ariba via CIG, but because of the missing of StorageLocation.csv missing in Ariba Batch Supported file, the transaction will always fail in CIG no matter if there are or not other data object.

I opened a case, saying this is an error and it should be added, but the support person is clearly refusing to do anything mentioning that there is an article which is saying:

  1. The payload for Storage Location master data should contain the StorageLocation.csv file. However, this file isn't included in the 'Import Batch Data tasks' of the Ariba Procurement solution. This means that when this file is sent from ERP to Ariba procurement via CIG, the transaction is likely to fail. This issue is also discussed at https://support.ariba.com/item/view/KB0400688.
  2. To import the Storage location master data into Ariba procurement, you may need to utilize the test run option. Following this, execute the report ARBCIG_MASTER_DATA_EXPORT for the Storage location master data, and obtain the StorageLocation.csv file locally. 
  3. Finally, use this local file to manually upload it in the Ariba Procurement solution. You can do this by selecting the 'Import Storage Location Data' task under the 'Data Import/Export' option within the Site Manager in Ariba Procurement.

Why do an article instead of fixing the issue, the article was for sure created because many customers faced this issue and opened a case. The purpose of the CIG is to automate import of data, but because SAP always work in silo, the team didn't probably consult any one and release the data without doing an end-to-end test.

In this documentation (https://help.sap.com/docs/buying-invoicing/procurement-data-import-and-administration-guide/data-import-order-for-sap-erp), it is cleearly mentionned that the storage location file should be at the position #69 of the Batch Sequence, but someone has to add it there, but again, instead of involving the correct team to do the right thing for customer, the Support Team, said the documentation is wrong and therefore he doesn't do anything. 

Honestly speaking...how will you tacle this situation?

entry.title: Re: SAP Community Escape House for May - ABAP Cloud
entry.content: Fun way to learn ABAP. Thanks! @sheenamk

entry.title: Re: Actions in Behavior Definition For CDS Custom Entity
entry.content:
we usually don't perform CRUD Operations with custom CDS,CDS Custom Entities are designed primarily for read-only scenarios.
The  one of  possible solution  is to create a Proper BO for this purpose to interact with database table and Performing CRUD Operations.

entry.title: Re: How to reach out to SAP Education - Learning Hub team for support
entry.content:
dear @EmilioCC ,
Thank you for the prompt response. just dropped a chat as per your instructions. i hope issue gets resolved.

regards,
Sayyed
